scripts.dev:stack: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d surrealdb qdrant redis && echo 'Waiting for DBs...' && sleep 3 && npm run dev --workspace=packages/api & npm run dev --workspace=packages/web & wait
scripts.dev:db: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d surrealdb qdrant redis
scripts.dev:db:stop: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml stop surrealdb qdrant redis
